attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
CASE WHEN GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999
WHEN GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888 
ELSE GL.SALES_ORDER_KEY END SALES_ORDER_KEY,
RP.RU_BK_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
CASE WHEN GL.AR_TRX_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -9999
WHEN GL.AR_TRX_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888 
ELSE GL.AR_TRX_KEY END AR_TRX_KEY,
CASE WHEN GL.END_CUSTOMER_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE GL.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
CASE WHEN GL.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE GL.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
CASE WHEN GL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE GL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
CASE WHEN GL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE GL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY END SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
CASE WHEN GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999 ELSE GL.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY END SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
GL.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD, 
GL.REV_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD, 
GL.DV_CORPORATE_REVENUE_FLG, 
GL.DV_IC_REVENUE_FLG, 
GL.DV_CHARGES_FLG, 
GL.DV_MISC_FLG, 
GL.DV_SERVICE_FLG, 
GL.DV_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG, 
GL.DV_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG, 
GL.DV_REVENUE_FLG,
GL.TRANSACTION_TYPE_CATEGORY_CD, 
GL.WAREHOUSE_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
ADJ_TYPE.L3_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID,  
ADJ_TYPE.L2_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID,
ADJ_TYPE.L1_HIERARCHY_NODE_TYPE_ID, 
GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT, 
GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_LIST_PRICE_AMT, 
GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_LIST_PRICE_AM, 
GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_COST_AMT, 
GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_REV_AMT, 
GL.DV_COMP_US_NET_REV_AMT, 
GL.DV_COMP_US_2TIER_CMDM_AMT, 
GL.DV_COMP_US_GROSS_COST_AMT, 
GL.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT, 
GL.DD_EXTENDED_NET_QTY, 
GL.DD_EXTENDED_GROSS_QTY,
GL.GL_DISTRIB_FUNCTIONAL_AMT, 
GL.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT, 
GL.DV_EXTENDED_QTY, 
FISCAL.RUN_BATCH_ID 
FROM
 $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE GL
  INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_R_PRODUCTS_REV_AGGR_ME  RP
  ON (GL.PRODUCT_KEY=RP.ITEM_KEY)
  INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.WI_REV_QTR_AGGR_BATCHES_ME FISCAL
  ON (FISCAL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT=GL.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT)
  INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_DIRECT_INDIRECT_ADJ_TYPE ADJ_TYPE
  ON (GL.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD = ADJ_TYPE.BK_ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CD 
  AND GL.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD = ADJ_TYPE.BK_REVENUE_OR_COGS_TYPE_CD
 AND GL.DD_BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD = ADJ_TYPE.BK_DIRECT_CORP_ADJ_TYPE_CD)
